parameters.apprise_url_plus: twilio://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.account_sid_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.auth_token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Twilio destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise twilio:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Twilio Messages API form body and post it to api.twilio.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: To=${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_TO }&From=${ customer_secrets.TWILIO_SMS_FROM }&Body={* _escape_uri(((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or ""))) *}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Twilio number (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Twilio destinations, direct

account_sid_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twilio account sid

auth_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twilio auth token

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Twilio from phone
